comment.body: So we broke 5393 with heightened volatility, and it was stopped dead in its tracks. Same thing happened on Friday when price should've confirmed lower prices with VOL and it stopped under confirmation, traded around that price, and then ground higher in EOD.
comment.raw_body: So we broke 5393 with heightened volatility, and it was stopped dead in its tracks. Same thing happened on Friday when price should've confirmed lower prices with VOL and it stopped under confirmation, traded around that price, and then ground higher in EOD.

comment.body: So downward confirmation levels are actually acting as support regions. Tough if you trade it literally. Tough environment.
comment.raw_body: So downward confirmation levels are actually acting as support regions. Tough if you trade it literally. Tough environment.
